nodes.name: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl
nodes.description: name: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl | short_description: Protein-packed cottage cheese bowl with pineapple and cinnamon for a tangy, tropical-inspired breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion:
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl - name: Cottage Cheese Bowl — Citrus Fresh Bowl | short_description: Protein-packed cottage cheese bowl with pineapple and cinnamon for a tangy, tropical-inspired breakfast or snack. | meal_suggestion: Cottage cheese bowl topped with pineapple and a light dusting of cinnamon. Enjoy as a quick high-protein breakfast or snack. For more fiber and staying power, add berries, chia seeds, or a small handful of nuts. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich cottage cheese delivers satiety and calcium; pineapple contributes vitamin C and natural sweetness with modest sugars. Cinnamon adds aroma and may modestly aid blood sugar regulation.

nodes.name: Smoothie — Sesame Twist
nodes.description: name: Smoothie — Sesame Twist | short_description: Creamy banana oat smoothie with milk and peanut butter; protein- and fiber-rich, balanced and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Great as a quick breakfa
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Smoothie — Sesame Twist - name: Smoothie — Sesame Twist | short_description: Creamy banana oat smoothie with milk and peanut butter; protein- and fiber-rich, balanced and satisfying. | meal_suggestion: Great as a quick breakfast or post-workout drink. To honor the Sesame Twist, top with sesame seeds or swirl in a small amount of tahini; optionally add a pinch of cinnamon or vanilla for extra aroma. | nutrition_note: Balanced smoothie with carbohydrates from banana and oats, protein from milk and peanut butter, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Good source of calcium and potassium; can be calorie-dense, so adjust portions to fit your needs. For a Sesame Twist, consider topping with sesame seeds or swirling in a bit of tahini.

nodes.name: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake
nodes.description: name: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake | short_description: An egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; a simple, protein-forward dish featuring vegetables. | meal_suggestion: Best
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake - name: Egg Scramble — Garlic-Ginger Bake | short_description: An egg scramble with spinach and tomatoes cooked in olive oil; a simple, protein-forward dish featuring vegetables. | meal_suggestion: Best as a quick breakfast or light lunch; pair with whole-grain toast or fruit for extra fiber and complex carbs. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich eggs provide essential amino acids and satiety; olive oil contributes heart-healthy fats; spinach and tomatoes add fiber, vitamins A, C, and K, and minerals—resulting in a balanced, quick breakfast.
